system.notes: A hard/firmpoint with a weapon permanently affixed, firing in a fixed arc (aimed by moving the vehicle; doubled recoil on hovercraft). Parts cost & CF by type: external hardpoint 2,000¥/1 CF, external firmpoint 750¥/0.5 CF, internal hardpoint 3,000¥/4 CF, internal firmpoint 1,500¥/3 CF; Avail 6/7 days; Street Index 2; Base Time 24 hrs; load −(10 kg + weapon weight). Rigger 2 p.131–132.
